output.summary: Implemented pt-8 top padding on the outer wrapper (always applied) and the new displayAboveContent boolean attribute for overlay/transparent-header mode. Changes touch all four files: block.json (new attribute), HeaderMain.php (docblock, variable extraction, outer wrapper classes, header-main div classes + data attribute), HeaderMain.tsx (type, outer wrapper, header-main div, ToggleControl in Behaviour panel), and HeaderMain.js (read data attribute, guard showSpacer() in updateScrollStatus and openMenu). Test page updated with new 'Display Above Content (Overlay Mode)' variation.

filesChanged.description: Added displayAboveContent boolean attribute with default false

Added @var bool $displayAboveContent to docblock; added $displayAboveContent = !empty($displayAboveContent) extraction; updated outer wrapper to use class_name() with 'flex flex-col gap-2 pt-8' always and '-mb-[var(--header-main-height,0px)]' when displayAboveContent; added 'absolute left-0 right-0 z-200' and data-display-above-content attribute to .header-main div

Added displayAboveContent: boolean to HeaderMainAttributes type; added 'flex flex-col gap-2 pt-8' (always) and '-mb-[var(--header-main-height,0px)]' (conditional) to useBlockProps className; added 'absolute left-0 right-0 z-200' and data-display-above-content to header-main div; added ToggleControl for displayAboveContent in Behaviour PanelBody; ran bun run format to fix Prettier formatting

Added const displayAboveContent = !!parseInt(header.dataset.displayAboveContent, 10); guard; wrapped showSpacer() in updateScrollStatus with if (!displayAboveContent) condition; wrapped showSpacer() in openMenu with if (!displayAboveContent) condition

testPageUpdated.added: Display Above Content (Overlay Mode) variation with displayAboveContent:true, fixedOnScrollDesktop:true, fixedOnScrollMobile:true, with logo, SEP link, search, and 3 nav items

validation.warningNotes: All 12 warnings are pre-existing in unrelated blocks (Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, EventHero, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs react-hooks/exhaustive-deps). Two sync warnings for HeaderMain are pre-existing: structure difference (TSX uses InnerBlocks, PHP renders directly) and class_name() inside theme_block_props() (pattern already existed before this revision).

attributeChanges.name: displayAboveContent
attributeChanges.description: When enabled, the header uses position:absolute initially, overlaying the content below it. A negative bottom margin (-mb-[var(--header-main-height,0px)]) pulls subsequent content up under the header. Fixed-on-scroll still works on top: CSS transitions from absolute to fixed when .scrolling class is applied. showSpacer() is skipped when this is true since no layout shift compensation is needed.
